judge.notes: GROUNDING VETO: grounding=10 < floor 12 — likely fabrication. Verdict forced FAIL (sum=80 would otherwise have been WARN). The agent correctly routed to query_fundamentals, but the answer has two grounding issues: (1) three of the four EPS values are uncited, and (2) the tool returned status=ok items=1, so claiming 'data not available' for Q2 FY2026 is unsupported. The framing is slightly off because the user asked for four quarters but only three are provided. The single most impactful fix is to cite every EPS figure to its tool row and to verify that the tool actually returned data for the claimed quarters before marking any as missing.
